name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
💀|  getting ambushed and captured on a mission ♡ requested by cherrywillowtreehouse

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌
Notes: I left it open for yall to choose if you want to live/die.. 

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌
Also- received my first like “death threat/die” comment on here and I'm low key at a loss for words lmao. 

A reminder that kindness is free and everyone deserves to be treated with love and respect. With so much hate going on in the world already I don’t see why there’s people that feel the need to say shit like this. It’s disgusting. 

That one comment could have made such a drastic difference on me a few years ago and it’s wild to think that people are still like this, let alone on an website like this. 

If you don’t like my shit then fuck off? It’s not rocket science babe. Gtfo. 😒 

**little rant over, sorry.**
creator: Nicoolee
